questions.q: According to a Senate Democrats report released in mid-April 2026, what did drugmakers do despite deals touted by Donald Trump?
options: Raised prices on hundreds of drugs
questions.correctText: Raised prices on hundreds of drugs

questions.q: In April 2026, the FDA announced it will convene a panel to weigh easing limits on what unapproved therapies promoted by RFK Jr.?
Authorities reported in April 2026 that a Florida doctor was indicted after fatally removing which of a patient's organs instead of their spleen?
A mid-April 2026 study found that drinking two to three cups of coffee a day is linked to a lower risk of what condition?
Researchers in San Francisco reported 'unprecedented' results in an April 2026 clinical trial, getting closer to a potential cure for what disease?
